title: PushFailureDiagnostic
description: A durable diagnostic for a remote push attempt that failed after approval. It deliberately stores only the reviewed push effect and a machine-readable code, never the raw remote URL, stderr, credentials, or argv.

PushErrorCode.description: A machine-readable code for a refused push operation, serialized as the shared `opensks.git-error.v1` contract.

oneOf.description: The supplied `--effect-digest` did not match the intent's current digest (the oid or ref moved). No usable approval is recorded; execution is refused.
No still-valid approval exists for the intent; execution is refused.
The ref is protected and no approval acknowledged it (`--ack-protected`).
The remote push itself failed (e.g. an unreachable remote). The local commit and the pending intent are preserved for retry.
The referenced intent does not exist in the durable store.
